## Type of change

- [ ] `feat` — new feature
- [ ] `fix` — bug fix
- [ ] `chore` — config, deps, tooling
- [ ] `refactor` — restructuring without behaviour change
- [ ] `docs` — documentation only

## Branch & commit convention reminder

```
Branch:  <type>/<issue-number>-<short-slug>
         e.g. feat/21-llm-prompt-engineering

Commit:  <type>(<scope>): <short description>
         e.g. feat(analysis): add GPT-4o mini integration with JWT auth

Scopes:  auth | scan | ocr | reader | library | backend | infra
```
